name: Chocolate Mint Coffee
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the ground coffee in a blender or food processor.
2. In a separate cup, combine 1 teaspoon of chocolate extract, 1/2 teaspoon of mint extract, and 1/4 teaspoon of vanilla extract.
3. With the blender or food processor running, slowly add the extracts to the coffee.
4. Stop the blender or food processor occasionally and scrape down the sides of the container with a spatula.
5. Process for an additional 10 seconds.
6. Store the mixture in the refrigerator. This will yield eight servings of approximately 6 ounces each.
